intro: Smash endless hordes of meme monsters as genius scientists! Roguelike survival with insane builds and infinite chaos!
description:
HOW LONG CAN YOU SURVIVE?

Memebonk is a roguelike survival where six great scientists battle endless waves of brainrot monsters. Pick a hero with a unique power, step onto the infinite battlefield, and prove that brains beat chaos.

THREE LOCATIONS — THREE WORLDS
The Great Library, where knowledge becomes a weapon. The Garden of Eden, where danger hides behind every flower. The Synthwave Desert, where neon and sand merge into madness. Every map is randomly generated — no two runs are ever the same.

BECOME ABSURDLY POWERFUL
Destroy enemies, collect XP, and level up on the fly. Every upgrade is random with varying rarity — craft insane builds and break the game in your favor. 40+ items with unique synergies give you endless room to experiment.

6 SCIENTISTS — 6 STYLES
Each character has their own core power and changes how you play. Find your favorite, unlock new ones, and try unexpected combinations.

BOSSES AND 130+ QUESTS
Waves of small foes are just the warm-up. Mighty bosses will put your build to the test. And a system of over 130 quests keeps things fresh even after hundreds of runs.

Stylish characters, gorgeous animations, addictive gameplay. One run — and you won't be able to stop.
